'''ât-k-v-h''' ('''katakvehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tudorize|tudorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tudorize|tudorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| katakvehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakvehoko|thitakvehoko]] || [[word:jitakvehoko|jitakvehoko]] || [[word:shitakvehoko|shitakvehoko]] || [[word:kitakvehoko|kitakvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakvehoko|thuthutakvehoko]] || [[word:jujutakvehoko|jujutakvehoko]] || [[word:shushutakvehoko|shushutakvehoko]] || [[word:kukutakvehoko|kukutakvehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakvehoko|thotakvehoko]] || [[word:jotakvehoko|jotakvehoko]] || [[word:shotakvehoko|shotakvehoko]] || [[word:kotakvehoko|kotakvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtakvehoko|thĂŠtakvehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtakvehoko|jĂŠtakvehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtakvehoko|shĂŠtakvehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtakvehoko|kĂŠtakvehoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakvehoko|thatakvehoko]] || [[word:jatakvehoko|jatakvehoko]] || [[word:shatakvehoko|shatakvehoko]] || [[word:katakvehoko|katakvehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
